children.heading: Cooperation and coordination
children.label: a Cooperation and coordination
children.text: Federal agencies shall assist the Secretary by cooperating and coordinating with the Secretary in the preparation of any necessary reports under this subchapter and the mission plan under .section 10221 of this title

No action of the Secretary or any other Federal agency required by this subchapter or with respect to a test and evaluation facility to be taken prior to the initiation of onsite construction of a test and evaluation facility shall require the preparation of an environmental impact statement under section 102(2)(C) of the Environmental Policy Act of 1969 (), or to require the preparation of environmental reports, except as otherwise specifically provided for in this subchapter.section 10221 of this title42 U.S.C. 4332(2)(C)

The Secretary and the heads of all other Federal agencies shall, to the maximum extent possible, avoid duplication of efforts in the preparation of reports under the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 4321
